_purpose: Configuration + runtime state for the automated factory loop (docs/workflow/automation.md). The template ships with enabled=false; enabling is a per-project step. In an armed project the workflows persist the mutable `runtime` block on the unprotected `factory-state` branch, never on protected main.

review_2._modes: auto = Codex when CODEX_AUTH_JSON or OPENAI_API_KEY is configured, else a manual phone gate; set to 'manual' to force the manual gate

notifications._topic: The ntfy topic comes from the NTFY_TOPIC secret, never from this file

runtime._comment: Mutable loop state written by scripts/factory/dispatch.py; do not hand-edit except to recover.
